title: Visual Traveler's Title Biomes Addon
description: A traveler's title addon for all vanilla biomes
body:
# Travelers Titles Addon
A traveler's title resource pack to make it just as good as the Visual traveler's title addon from un_roman. Except this one just does biomes instead of dimensions. 

The titles are a bit low but this is to fit the original textures by un_roman, otherwise when joining a dimension they would be on top of each other. 


Heavily inspired by un_roman 

Made with plugin from Ewan Howell

Any bugs or fixes please report them on the github! 

### Compatibility
I might addon some biome mods later on, undecided still. You can also make them yourself message me to include them or distribute it on your own.
